meta.title: Securing California's Distributed Energy Resources (DER)
meta.description:
California is amongst the largest deployments of rooftop solar power. Tom Tansy of SunSpec shows how California is approaching securing the smart inverters to prevent DER based attacks on the grid. This is captured in California Rule 21, and is likely to impact DER security across the US. Like many ICS protocols it uses TLS and uses certificates for mutual authentication. SunSpec set ups and is operating the related PKI.

Tom looks at the threats today and what are likely threats will be as the amount of DER increases.

At the end you will see some tough questions and potential issues with the California approach.
